title: fix(deps): update module github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/estargz to v0.18.0
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/estargz](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter) | `v0.17.0` -> `v0.18.0` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fcontainerd%2fstargz-snapshotter%2festargz/v0.18.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fcontainerd%2fstargz-snapshotter%2festargz/v0.17.0/v0.18.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containerd/stargz-snapshotter (github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/estargz)</summary>

### [`v0.18.0`](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/releases/tag/v0.18.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/compare/v0.17.0...v0.18.0)

#### Notable Changes

- Fixed restoring error of snapshots on unexpected restart of stargz snapshotter ([#​2091](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/issues/2091), [#​2092](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/issues/2092)), thanks to [@​wswsmao](https://redirect.github.com/wswsmao)
- Added FadvDontNeed option to reduce pagecache consumption in stargz snapshotter ([#​2095](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/issues/2095)), thanks to [@​wswsmao](https://redirect.github.com/wswsmao)
- Removed `testing` dependency from code outside tests ([#​2098](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/issues/2098)), thanks to [@​rosstimothy](https://redirect.github.com/rosstimothy)
- Added `all` option for the ctr-remote's `--gpus` flag ([#​2102](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/issues/2102), [#​2118](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/issues/2118)), thanks to [@​wswsmao](https://redirect.github.com/wswsmao)
- Added `--prefetch-list` flag to ctr-remote ([#​2113](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/issues/2113), [#​2148](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/issues/2148)), thanks to [@​wswsmao](https://redirect.github.com/wswsmao)
- Enabled deduplication in ImageRecorder.Record ([#​2116](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/issues/2116)), thanks to [@​wswsmao](https://redirect.github.com/wswsmao)
- Fixed potential data race in nativeconverter/estargz ([#​2133](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/issues/2133)), thanks to [@​escapefreeg](https://redirect.github.com/escapefreeg)
- Added support of decompression helpers in ctr-remote for better conversion speed ([#​2117](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/issues/2117)), thanks to [@​escapefreeg](https://redirect.github.com/escapefreeg)
- Improved logging behaviour in fusemanager ([#​2135](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/issues/2135)), thanks to [@​mmonaco](https://redirect.github.com/mmonaco)
- Fixed to preserve normal snapshots during cleanup in stargz snapshotter ([#​2127](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/issues/2127)), thanks to [@​ChengyuZhu6](https://redirect.github.com/ChengyuZhu6)
- Fixed lazy pulling failure on images with empty layers ([#​2137](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/issues/2137))
- Fixed stargz snapshotter to run without depending on fusermount by default ([#​2146](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/issues/2146))
- Enabled ctr-remote to capture early file access ([#​2129](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/issues/2129)), thanks to [@​wswsmao](https://redirect.github.com/wswsmao)
- Refactors and document fixes ([#​2112](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/issues/2112), [#​2150](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/issues/2150)), thanks to [@​wswsmao](https://redirect.github.com/wswsmao)

</details>

---
